package rulecoverage

func NegativeGormSessionOptionsConfiguredOutsideRepository() string {
    ruleID := "gorm_session_options_configured_outside_repository"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Code above the repository layer that changes `Session`, `Clauses`, or transaction options directly."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
